title: Bachelor's Thesis
description: Detecting anomalies in network traffic using Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) by constructing node graphs based on packet exchanges between network endpoints.

title: Medical Records Project
description: Processing and extracting information from medical records using Large Language Models. Implemented LoRA fine-tuning and Named Entity Recognition (NER) for structured data extraction.

title: The Public Right
description: A web application for accessing and interacting with public information. Built using a backend API and a modern web frontend.

title: Baljan ML
description: Training a machine learning model on Baljan Café purchase data to predict future inventory needs and reduce waste.

title: Image Classifier
description: Image classification using a ResNet architecture with transfer learning to improve performance with limited data.

title: Baljan
description: A full-stack application deployed online for managing café-related data and services.

title: Raspberry Pi Project
description: Setting up a local VPN and DNS server using a Raspberry Pi for enhanced privacy and network control.
